card.name: Ascendants' Tellstones
card.text: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains reach, trample, hexproof, and indestructible until end of turn. Untap it. • Ascendants' Tellstones deals 5 damage to target creature. • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn and fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Azir, Golden Legacy
card.text: Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.) Whenever you look at the top cards of your library, create a 1/1 red and white Sand Soldier creature token with "This creature gets +1/+0 for each other Soldier you control." At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have the city's blessing, transform Azir. --- (Back): Azir, Emperor of the Sands

card.name: Azir, Emperor of the Sands
card.text: When Azir transforms, scry X plus two, where X is the number of Sand Soldiers you control. Whenever you look at the top cards of your library, create that many 1/1 red and white Sand Soldier creature tokens with "This creature gets +1/+0 for each other Soldier you control." --- (Front): Azir, Golden Legacy

card.text: Trample, lifelink Whenever Dr. Mundo is dealt damage, put that many +1/+1 counters on him. Whenever you lose life, put that many +1/+1 counters on Dr. Mundo.

card.name: Kled and Skaarl, Cantankerous Cavaliers
card.text: Flash, haste Kled and Skaarl have hexproof as long as they are tapped. Whenever Kled and Skaarl attack, if they entered since the end of your last turn, creatures you control get +2/+2 and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Rammus, Armordillo
card.text: Rammus must be blocked each combat if able. Rammus can block up to three creatures each combat. Whenever Rammus is dealt damage, he deals 1 damage to that source's controller.

card.name: Diana, Scorn of the Moon
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and Diana gains "This creature cannot be blocked by creatures with lesser power" until end of turn. Whenever Diana deals combat damage to a player, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Jhin, the Grandiose Virtuoso
card.text: Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, you may exile target nonland card from your graveyard and cast a copy of it. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4, Jhin deals 4 damage to each opponent and up to one target creature and you draw a card.

card.name: Steadfast Elkin
card.text: Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, Steadfast Elkin gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Solemn Minion
card.text: Magecraft — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Burst — {T}: Solemn Minion deals 2 damage to any target. Activate only if you've cast three or more spells this turn.

card.name: Moonlit Glenkeeper
card.text: When this creature enters, sprout 2, sprout 2 (To sprout 2, create an Incubator token with two +1/+1 counters on it and "{2}: Transform this enchantment." It transforms into a 0/0 Plant enchantment creature.) Whenever a permanent you control transforms, surveil 1 and sprout 2. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Grumpy Rockbear
card.text: When Grumpy Rockbear enters, create a Food token. Impart 1—{2}{G} ({2}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Trample

card.name: Brash Gambler
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards. Whenever Brash Gambler attacks, exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.

card.name: Prowling Cutthroat
card.text: Menace When Prowling Cutthroat enters, it deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Inspiring Marshal
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, it gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Hired Gun
card.text: When Hired Gun enters, target creature must block this turn if able.

card.name: Ye Be Warned
card.text: Target creature must block this turn if able. When that creature dies this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Merciless Hunter
card.text: When Merciless Hunter enters, target creature must block this turn if able and you create a Food token.

card.name: Servitude of Desolation
card.text: Choose one — • Target player sacrifices an artifact. • Target player sacrifices an enchantment. Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Golden Herald
card.text: Whenever Golden Herald enters or attacks, create two 1/1 red and white Sand Soldier creature tokens with "This creature gets +1/+0 for each other Soldier you control." Soldiers you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Suppressive Bindings
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block and its activated abilities can't be activated. Whenever enchanted creature's controller casts a noncreature spell, they may exile enchanted creature. Otherwise, you create tapped Treasure tokens equal to that spell's mana value.

card.name: Marai Warden
card.text: {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {T}, Remove two +1/+1 counters from target creature you control: Scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Flow
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If it has at least one +1/+1 counter on it, draw a card.

card.name: Ghastly Band
card.text: Whenever Ghastly Band enters or dies, create a 1/1 white Spirit Creature token with "{T}: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Valiant Minion
card.text: Flurry — Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Valiant Minion deals 2 damage to target creature or opponent.

card.name: Ixtali Sentinel
card.text: Lifelink When Ixtali Sentinel enters, target instant or sorcery spell in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Piercing Darkness
card.text: Piercing Darkness deals 5 damage to any target. You gain 5 life.

card.name: Voracious Trickster
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a creature or discard a card. Last hit — Whenever this creature deals lethal damage to another permanent, draw a card.

card.name: Expeditious Tumble
card.text: Target creature you control phases out. If it's modified or a Darkin, you draw a card and lose 1 life. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn. Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Curse of the Tomb
card.text: Enchant creature If a source would deal damage to enchanted creature, it deals twice that much damage instead. When enchanted creature dies, exile it instead and you draw a card.

card.name: Study of Supression
card.text: Choose one — • Draw three cards, then discard two cards unless you discard an instant or sorcery card. • Fatigue up to two target nonland permanents. (Turn that permanent face down. It becomes a 1/1 Rift Avatar creature with "Pay {1}: Turn this permanent face up. Activate only as a sorcery." When that permanent would untap, turn it face up.)

card.name: Titan's Riptide
card.text: Each player mills ten cards. When Titan's Riptide is cycled, tap target creature. Its controller mills two cards. Cycling {2}{B} ({2}{B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Divine Draft
card.text: Draw a card. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Roar of Icathia
card.text: When Roar of Icathia enters, you may return target equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield. {2}: Attach target Equipment you control to target creature you control.

card.name: Mana Barrier
card.text: Enchant creature Indestructible Enchanted creature gets +2/+2. When enchanted creature would leave, instead sacrifice Mana Barrier and tap enchanted creature.

card.name: Rite of the Arcane
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or land you control. Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library. Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Hex Core Calculations
card.text: Choose one. If you control a construct as you cast this spell, you may choose two instead — • Draw two cards. • Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.) • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}, where X is the highest power among Constructs you control.

card.name: Siphon Power
card.text: Counter target spell. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Death's Hand
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, target opponent loses 1 life. {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Camouflaged Horror
card.text: Impart 2—{2}{B}{G} ({2}{B}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card and put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Menace Whenever a nontoken creature dies, you create a Food token.

card.name: Feed the Void
card.text: Destroy target creature. You gain 3 life.

card.name: All-Terrain Trooper
card.text: Impart 1—{R}{G} ({R}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Reach, vigilance

card.name: Icevale Cultist
card.text: Reach, vigilance, deathtouch Equipped creatures you control have deathtouch.

card.name: Wiggly Burblefish
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you've cast a spell this turn. When Wiggly Burblefish enters, target opponent reveals their hand.

card.name: Jousting
card.text: Target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains haste and trample until end of turn, where X is its power or mana value, whichever is greater.

card.name: Endless Banquet
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, you gain 1 life. If its the second or fourth time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Absolution
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice a creature you control: Put a mana counter on this enchantment. {2}: Target creature you control gets +X/+X and gains lifelink until end of turn, where X is the number of mana counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Hex Core Upgrade
card.text: Put three level or +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Then if you control a creature with power 6 or greater, draw a card. (It only levels up once.)

card.name: Armed Gearhead
card.text: First strike Armed Gearhead gets +1/+0 for each artifact you control. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Armed Gearhead gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Aurora Hallunatis
card.text: Flying, deathtouch When Aurora Hallunatis enters, draw a card.

card.name: Secret Keeper
card.text: Flash When Secret Keeper enters and whenever an opponent draws a card except the first one they draw in each of their draw steps, you gain 1 life. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Ascended's Call
card.text: Search your library for a legendary creature card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you don't have the city's blessing, you get it for the rest of the game. Otherwise, put a legendary creature from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Deathbringer Sweep
card.text: Choose a target creature you control. It gains lifelink until end of turn and deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Chemtech Catermobile
card.text: Chemtech Catermobile's power is equal to the number of creatures you control with mana value 1 or less. Whenever a creature you control with mana value 1 or less enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Chemtech Catermobile. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Eternal Dancers
card.text: When Eternal Dancers enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Then if Eternal Dancers isn't a token, create a token copy of it.

card.name: Taloned Strike
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may tap a creature you control with flying and power X. This spell costs {X} less to cast. Taloned Strike deals X damage to target tapped or blocking creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Stoneweaving
card.text: Manaflow — Whenever a land or an Elemental you control enters, create a Treasure token or put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Ruined Undergrowth
card.text: Mill three cards, then return up to one land or creature card from among them into your hand.

card.name: Marai Greatmother
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand. When Marai Greatmother enters or attacks, mill the top two cards of your library.

card.name: Bloodcursed Harpy
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Bloodcursed Harpy would die, if it's modified, it doesn't. Instead, tap it, destroy all attached Equipment and Auras, and remove all counters from it. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: Veiled Protector
card.text: Whenever Veiled Protector enters, you gain 2 life and draw a card. Creature spells you control can't be countered. Creatures you control with power 6 or greater have ward {2}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Blooming Lotus Trap
card.text: When Blooming Lotus Trap enters, tap target creature. {2}, Sacrifice Blooming Lotus Trap: Put a stun counter on target tapped creature and draw a card.

card.name: Shield of Durand
card.text: Equipped creature gets +0/+2 and has ward {1}. (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Equip {2}

card.name: Golden Spatula
card.text: Equipped creature gets +3/+2. When Golden Spatula becomes equipped, choose one — • Golden Spatula gains "Equipped creature gains reach." • Golden Spatula gains "Equipped creature gains vigilance" Equip {2}

card.name: Forgotten Artifact
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {3}, {T}: Transform target nonland permanent you control.

card.name: Lavender Sea
card.text: When Lavender Sea enters, tap it and you may sacrifice any number of lands you control. For each land sacrificed this way, put a charge counter on Lavender Sea. Ward {2} (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of charge counters on Lavender Sea.

card.name: Sacred Shears
Demacian Steel
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+2 and has vigilance. Equip {2}

card.name: Loaded Dice
card.text: When Loaded Dice enters, choose a number. Whenever the chosen number is rolled or a spell with that mana value is cast, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Instant Century
card.text: Each player discards their hand, puts the top seven cards of their library into their hand, then untaps each land they control. Each player's life total becomes half their starting life total, if lower. Until end of turn, each player may cast spells as though they had flash. Exile Instant Century.

card.name: Baited Response
card.text: Untap target attacking creature you control. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to that creature this turn. (Damage that creature deals is not prevented). After your postcombat main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Eclipse Dragon
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you discard a creature card with flying, put a flying counter on target creature you control if that creature had flying. Repeat this process for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Devourer of the Depths
card.text: Menace When Devourer of the Depths enters, target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a card from it. That player exiles that card and you gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Thrumming Swarm
card.text: Impart 0—{3}{G} ({3}{G}, Discard this card: Draw a card and put zero +1/+1 counters on target creature. It gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Flying At the beginning of each end step, as long as you have the city's blessing, create a token copy of this creature.

card.name: Bear Trap on a Rope
card.text: When this artifact enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Sacrifice Bear Trap on a Rope: Target creature must block this turn if able.
